reference: I have recently had two blood tests, and both have come back with a low white blood cell count. I had the swine flu a couple of years ago; could that be the reason? I'm also pretty tired lately, which is one reason I went to the doctor. Other symptoms include typical menopausal symptoms and tingling in my feet and legs.
text: I have recently had two blood tests, and both have come back with a low white blood cell count. I had the swine flu a couple of years ago. Could that be the reason?
